subcodes.title: Words to Mr W.W. Harmon, spoken on 1912-07-28
subcodes.first_line: The Theosophists are educating a boy in the schools of Europe and say that he will become the promised one of all nations. How ignorant is this! God must select the Promised One, not men.
subcodes.first_line_orig: تیاسفیها طفلی را در مدارس اروپا تربیت می کنند تا او موعود ملل شود چه قدر بی فکری است موعود را خدا باید انتخاب کند نه خلق
subcodes.subjects: @Theosophy, @false claims to divine revelation or spiritual stations, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @Manifestation of God as sun
